prompt: Create a bouncing ball animation — a red rubber ball bouncing on a concrete floor with a side-view camera
assertions: The output includes a valid JSON animation plan with scene, objects, motions, timeline, camera, and style fields
The output includes a complete Blender Python script using the bpy module
The script creates a UV sphere with a red material
The script includes keyframe animation for bouncing (location changes on Z-axis)
The script includes squash-and-stretch via scale keyframes
The script sets up a static side-view camera
The script includes render output settings
The output includes instructions for how to run the script
